page_title: The Unit-01 is Currently Under Maintenance - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Rapport Comics in June 1996. http://rei.in.coocan.jp/evabooks/tada1.html

ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4897992150
